Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Reasonable Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar May-04-2018 Continued To May-17-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Lawrence E. Hart, Esq. of Hartsuyker Stratman Williams-Abrego, Tel. 510.457.3447, appearing for cross-defendants/moving parties Romwald Connolly & Desmond Morgan;
Tarah G. Powell-Chen, Esq. of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney, Tel. 415.788.1900, appearing for cross-complainant/opposing party Michael Moore.

Cross-Complainant DOES NOT stipulate to the matter being heard by Judge Pro Tem Paul A. Renne.

Matter called, argument held.

At the conclusion of argument, there being a non-stip to the Judge Pro Tem, Cross-Defendants Romwald Connolly and Desmond Morgan's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Reasonable Attorneys Fees is continued to May 17, 2018 at 9:30 a.m., Law & Motion. Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne is to prepare a report and recommendation.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Romwald Connollys Responses To Written Discovery Requests Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Tarah G. Powell-Chen, Esq. of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney, T:415.788.1900, for defendant/moving party;
Blake Bostwick, Esq. of Bostwick & Peterson LLP, T:415.421.8300, for plaintiff/opposing party.

RULING: The tentative ruling was contested and argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL MOORE's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Romwald Connolly's Responses To Written Discovery Requests Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions is Granted in Part. Plaintiff must produce all documents in his possession, custody & control by 4/20/18. Defendant's request for monetary sanctions is denied in its entirety.

Counsel for defendant to prepare and submit a proposed order that repeats verbatim the Court's ruling and complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.
